top_signals.title: Russia unleashes huge missile and drone attacks on Kyiv
top_signals.summary: Bombardment follows Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s warning over Moscow preparing ‘massive strike’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Fall as Jitters Over Meta and Apple Hit Chipmakers
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks slumped as Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to sell computing power raised questions over excess in AI capacity, driving a selloff in chipmakers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sony to end video game disc production in January 2028
top_signals.summary: The gaming giant says the move toward digital-only games aligns the company with consumer trends toward online marketplaces.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
